text: The project had at least 20 commits in the last 90 days.
Multi-factor authentication is enabled for all administrative access.
The service maintained at least 99.9% uptime over the reporting period.
The security control was scanned for vulnerabilities within the last 30 days.
Over 5000 active users rely on the platform daily.
The project integrates with the internal identity provider.
There are exactly 3 maintainers on the project.
The project has a tracked source repository.
